meta.title: VSON | Activation Solutions
meta.description: Brand activation and market development solutions powered by 20 years of on-the-ground expertise. Three integrated layers: merchandise, data & campaign platform, and marketing automation.

og.title: VSON | Activation Solutions
og.description: Brand activation and market development solutions powered by 20 years of on-the-ground expertise. Three integrated layers: merchandise, data & campaign platform, and marketing automation.

page_hero.heading:
Activate your brand
in Vietnam.
page_hero.sub: From premium merchandise to campaign intelligence, VSON gives brands the tools, the team, and the infrastructure to create real impact with Vietnamese consumers.

rows.name: Merchandise & Activation
rows.headline: Premium branded touchpoints that create real-world presence.
rows.body: We design and produce brand merchandise, corporate gifts, and in-market activations that give your brand a physical presence in the moments that matter at retail, at events, and in the hands of your customers.

rows.name: Data & Campaign Platform
rows.headline: A connected platform that tracks every touchpoint.
rows.body: Our campaign intelligence platform measures what's working across every channel, surfaces actionable insight, and gives brand managers the visibility they need to make faster, smarter decisions in the Vietnamese market.

rows.name: Marketing & Automation
rows.headline: Automated workflows that turn data into the next action.
rows.body: We deploy marketing automation that uses campaign data to reach the right Vietnamese consumers, at the right time, through the right channel, faster and at a scale that manual execution cannot match.

why_brands.heading:
We don't just run campaigns.
We own the outcome.
why_brands.body: Most activation agencies in Vietnam handle one layer. VSON connects all three, so your brand doesn't lose value between strategy, execution, and insight.

items.title: On-Ground Network
items.body: Nationwide distribution infrastructure, not just campaign management from a desk.

items.title: Integrated Stack
items.body: Physical, data, and automation layers designed to work together from day one.

items.title: Proven Track Record
items.body: Serving Dell, HP, Lenovo, ASUS and leading consumer brands in Vietnam.

items.title: Phygital Expertise
items.body: 20 years bridging physical and digital commerce, before it had a name.

cta_band.heading: Ready to activate?
cta_band.body: Talk to our activation team about what's possible for your brand in Vietnam.
